ModMetaData.name: RimWorld MCP Bridge
ModMetaData.author: Hermes Agent
ModMetaData.description:
Exposes a local HTTP API for AI agents to read and control your RimWorld colony. Requires Harmony.
Full colony control: list pawns, manage skills/traits/health, spawn items, trigger events, manage research, issue bills, and more.
Connect via the Python MCP server at localhost:8765.
